seoTitle: Tonganah vs Tooms Lake — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tonganah and Tooms Lake. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Tonganah vs Tooms Lake: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tonganah and Tooms Lake.
heading: Tonganah vs Tooms Lake — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tonganah, Tasmania and Tooms Lake, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tonganah has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Tooms Lake (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tonganah or Tooms Lake safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tonganah has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Tooms Lake scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tonganah scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Tooms Lake scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tonganah or Tooms Lake?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tonganah has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
